channel.title: GitHub Shell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: DaoCloud/public-image-mirror
item.description: 很多镜像都在国外。比如 gcr 。国内下载很慢，需要加速。致力于提供连接全世界的稳定可靠安全的容器镜像服务。

item.title: SeleniumHQ/docker-selenium
item.description: Provides a simple way to run Selenium Grid with Chrome, Firefox, and Edge using Docker, making it easier to perform browser automation

item.title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
item.description: 《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀

item.title: datawhalechina/learn-nlp-with-transformers
item.description: we want to create a repo to illustrate usage of transformers in chinese

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: google/oss-fuzz
item.description: OSS-Fuzz - continuous fuzzing for open source software.

item.title: ublue-os/bazzite
item.description: Bazzite is a cloud native image built upon Fedora Atomic Desktops that brings the best of Linux gaming to all of your devices - including your favorite handheld.

item.title: CISOfy/lynis
item.description: Lynis - Security auditing tool for Linux, macOS, and UNIX-based systems. Assists with compliance testing (HIPAA/ISO27001/PCI DSS) and system hardening. Agentless, and installation optional.

item.title: InfinityLoop1308/PipePipe
item.description: A FLOSS Android app to let you browse YouTube, NicoNico and BiliBili freely.

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: Installomator/Installomator
item.description: Installation script to deploy standard software on Macs

item.title: getsentry/self-hosted
item.description: Sentry, feature-complete and packaged up for low-volume deployments and proofs-of-concept
